description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish animal, likely a bear or mouse, with a rounded body and short limbs. Its exterior is covered in a blue fabric with a subtle textured pattern, featuring white patches that mimic wear and tear, and a large tan patch on the back. The toy has a white belly with two black buttons and a small brown patch on one leg, adding to its well-loved appearance. The face is simple, with black circular eyes, a small black nose, and no visible mouth, giving it a neutral and gentle expression. The ears are rounded and lined with a lighter color on the inside, and the toy sits with its legs extended and arms slightly out to the sides. The overall look suggests a soft, cuddly companion that might be found in a child's play area, park, or left on a city bench.
description: A blue, well-worn stuffed animal with a white belly, black button details, and a large tan patch on its back. It has a simple, gentle face and sits with outstretched limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white belly with two black buttons, rounded ears, and a neutral face with black eyes and nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the protruding nose, and the tan patch wrapping around the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large tan patch covering most of the back and the rounded shape of the body and head.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the brown patch on the leg, the side of the face, and the continuation of the white wear marks.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round black eyes and a small black nose. There is no visible mouth, giving it a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward. The head is upright and facing forward.
